name: oh-my-snow
description: Oh-My-Snow — Autonomous orchestration plugin for Snow CLI

scripts.test: node test/test-hooks.mjs && node test/test-v2-hooks.mjs && node test/test-mcp.mjs && node test/test-skill-evolution.mjs && node test/test-review-fixes.mjs && node test/test-prd-fixes.mjs && node test/test-iteration-limits.mjs && node test/test-state-expire.mjs && node test/test-prd-verification.mjs && node test/test-completion-gate.mjs && node test/test-gate-scorecards.mjs && node test/test-oms-state.mjs && node test/test-installer.mjs && node test/test-direct-invocation.mjs && node test/test-verify-hardening.mjs && node test/test-maturity-contracts.mjs && node test/test-doctor.mjs
scripts.prepack: npm run clean:pack-noise && npm run build
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run clean:pack-noise && npm run build && npm test
